reachability_artifacts: go test ./cmd/sworn/... (styled commands exercised through entry points)

design_decisions.human_decision: acknowledged — reference branch code is clean and tested; copy verbatim
design_decisions.rationale: Spec directs reuse; reference package is zero-dependency and already passes style_test.go

design_decisions.choice: Command-file styling wraps existing fmt.Print* arguments in style.*() calls, never rephrases
design_decisions.human_decision: acknowledged — wrapping pattern guarantees byte-identical plain-text output
design_decisions.rationale: Preserves all golden-string and table-alignment tests

design_decisions.choice: main.go touchpoints: usage(), cmdVersion(), cmdHelp() only; skip dispatch() and TUI path
design_decisions.human_decision: acknowledged — T15 owns dispatch/registry pattern; no output text to style there
design_decisions.rationale: Avoids cross-track collision with T15 command registry

design_decisions.choice: Divider runs of = stay Dim-wrapped rather than converted to style.Rule
design_decisions.human_decision: acknowledged — preserves byte-identical plain output; Rule() emits box-drawing chars
design_decisions.rationale: Spec Risk section explicitly calls this out

design_decisions.choice: usage() text block: Banner at top, hint line at bottom; middle prose stays plain
design_decisions.human_decision: acknowledged — over-styling reference material degrades readability
